---
title: "Mussel Biomarkers"
subtitle: "Literature Notes"
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
---

### Literature Review Status
This doc will be light since I've already covered most of the lit in other notes/ note taking platforms.

### Quick Links

1.  Zotero Library

2.  Project repo

3.  Process/ Workflow

4.  Methods

### Currently Reading

### Questions

### Log

#### 2026-03-24

Setting up a place to put quick notes on the lit that will influence my decisions.
